markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Atlas working session to discuss initial experiences, issues, and next steps with the new content production tool.](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Atlas is buggy but expected; performance improvements and bug fixes are ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Internal linking and fact-checking steps need improvement; workarounds involve adding links in assignment brief stage](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Feedback column and editing capabilities to be reintroduced in future updates](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Airtable still used for project management; Atlas to eventually incorporate client-facing features](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=2172.0)

## Topics

### Atlas User Experience

  - [Markdown formatting in output makes reading difficult; rich text editor introduced but still buggy](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Assignment direction field crucial for controlling output; allows for template insertion and specific instructions](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Performance issues noted; team working on improvements](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [Outline editing currently not functioning properly for most users](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Content Quality Comparison

  - [Some users report better results from Atlas compared to Aerops, particularly for external linking](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Others note missing features like image search/generation and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Word count tends to be high, requiring external editing](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)

### Workflow Changes

  - [Some custom steps (e.g., image generation for Smith AI) not carried over from Aerops](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Style adaptation step removed due to issues with repetitive application](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Editing/feedback step to be reintroduced](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)

### LLM Usage and Preferences

  - [Team members use various LLMs (Claude, GPT, Gemini) for different tasks](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [Perplexity AI noted as a useful platform for accessing multiple models](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [Discussion on personal preferences and biases in model selection](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=1850.0)

### Project Management

  - [Airtable still used for tracking and client reporting](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=2172.0)
  - [Atlas currently shows legacy content; users encouraged to archive completed items](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Future state of Atlas to include client-facing surface with permissions](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=2237.0)

## Next Steps

  - [File Linear tickets for significant issues, especially those blocking production](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Archive legacy content in Atlas to clean up grids](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Carrie to set up one-on-one meetings with team members to discuss workflow](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=2386.0)
  - [Begin producing content for Good Call to address deficit](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=2499.0)
  - [Explore replicating custom workflows (e.g., area code for Good Call) in Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=2544.0)
  - [Carrie to meet with Sidira and provide more information on Yurko assignments](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=2569.0)
  - [Team to continue testing and providing feedback on Atlas functionality](https://fathom.video/share/NSmZyjpnNwgh-ResVyFjqpwDxsWCZsxx?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)
